initial_log_snippet:
2024-03-17T22:46:30Z ERROR [recommendation-service] RedisClusterError: CLUSTERDOWN The cluster is down (3/5 nodes unreachable)
2024-03-17T22:46:35Z ERROR [search-service] RedisClusterError: CLUSTERDOWN - same cluster endpoint redis-cluster-prod:6379
2024-03-17T22:46:38Z WARN  [notification-service] High memory usage: 91% heap (GC pressure, not Redis)
2024-03-17T22:46:40Z ERROR [recommendation-service] Fallback to cold cache failed: upstream Redis unavailable
2024-03-17T22:46:45Z ERROR [search-service] Full-text search degraded: Redis pipeline broken
2024-03-17T22:46:50Z WARN  [notification-service] Email dispatch latency 3800ms (SLA=2000ms) - internal queue backlog
2024-03-17T22:46:55Z ERROR [redis-cluster-prod] Node redis-node-3 lost quorum: net split detected on subnet 10.0.3.0/24
2024-03-17T22:47:00Z ERROR [redis-cluster-prod] Node redis-node-4 lost quorum: same subnet 10.0.3.0/24
2024-03-17T22:47:00Z INFO  [notification-service] GC pause 420ms - within acceptable bounds
red_herrings: notification-service memory usage is normal GC pressure, not the root cause
recommendation-service and search-service are victims of the Redis cluster failure, not causes
